audit_items.proof_trace: processCommand() can trigger freeClient() via memory management (freeMemoryIfNeeded → flushSlavesOutputBuffers → writeToClient), but processInputBuffer() continues dereferencing freed client pointer c at lines 1576, 1583, 1594-1596 without validation.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends commands triggering memory pressure, causing slave buffer flush that frees the current client connection, leading to use-after-free when processInputBuffer continues processing the freed client pointer.
